narrative:
Union Twp. township has 2,091 registered voters, with 47.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 38.8 percentage points.
